ptype.notes: Current raw support covers rain and freezing-rain categories. Full dominant precip type support may still need extra published categories or derivation.

snowfall.notes: Phase 1 treats snowfall as unavailable unless an explicit snow-supporting field appears in the raw index. Derived snowfall can be added in Phase 2.

wind_10m.notes: Phase 2 derives raster wind speed from UGRD/VGRD. Vector barbs remain a later enhancement.
